sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45571" key="eu)wxhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐωχ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n45571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must feast</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόγοις τὰς ἀγαθὰς ψυχάς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:28:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
